text: Our AI Safety Board convenes quarterly to review the risk register, assess newly identified hazards in the credit-scoring pipeline, and approve or reject proposed treatment measures before the next release cycle.
label: risk_management
note: risk committee minutes language; near record_keeping

text: The hazard analysis team applied IEC 62304 methodology to categorise each failure mode by severity and likelihood, producing a risk matrix that forms the basis of our pre-deployment sign-off checklist.
label: risk_management

text: Before the insurance underwriting model went live, a structured safety review validated that all residual risks fell within the organisation's defined risk appetite and that no critical unmitigated hazards remained.
label: risk_management

text: We conduct red-team exercises every six months in which internal testers attempt to elicit harmful outputs from the recommendation engine; findings are documented in the risk register and addressed before the next quarter.
label: risk_management
note: HARD: near security (red-team) and record_keeping (documented in register)

text: The risk treatment plan for the facial-analysis deployment assigns each identified hazard to a named owner, specifies the mitigation action, and records the target residual risk level after the control is applied.
label: risk_management

text: Foreseeable misuse scenarios, including deliberate adversarial inputs and unintended use by untrained staff, are catalogued and evaluated before the system is approved for pilot deployment.
label: risk_management

text: Our Failure Mode and Effects Analysis identified twelve potential failure paths in the automated triage module; each was ranked by Risk Priority Number and assigned a corrective action with a completion deadline.
label: risk_management

text: Post-market risk signals from customer complaint logs and operator error reports feed into a monthly risk review that can trigger an expedited assessment if a new safety concern is identified.
label: risk_management

text: Senior management formally accepted the residual risk for the patient-matching AI after reviewing evidence that the remaining exposure was below the clinical harm threshold defined in the risk management plan.
label: risk_management

text: Following ISO 14971 principles adapted for AI systems, we documented safety-relevant design inputs, established verification criteria, and maintained traceability between identified hazards and their mitigations throughout development.
label: risk_management
note: HARD: near technical_documentation — design inputs + traceability

text: Das Risikoregister für unser Kreditentscheidungssystem wird bei jeder Modellaktualisierung überprüft und enthält alle identifizierten Risiken mit ihren Minderungsmaßnahmen und akzeptierten Restrisiken.
label: risk_management

text: Unser Sicherheitsausschuss bewertet vierteljährlich alle neu aufgetretenen Risiken des KI-Systems und entscheidet über die Einleitung von Korrekturmaßnahmen oder die formale Risikoakzeptanz.
label: risk_management

text: Periodic verification tests confirm that all risk controls implemented at the previous assessment remain effective; any control failure triggers an unscheduled risk review and update of the mitigation plan.
label: risk_management

text: Accident scenario modelling for the autonomous route-planning system used Monte Carlo simulations to estimate the probability and impact of collision events under degraded sensor conditions.
label: risk_management

text: The risk management framework document establishes the scope, methodology, responsibilities, and review cadence for all risk activities across the AI system lifecycle, from data collection through post-market surveillance.
label: risk_management
note: HARD: near technical_documentation — framework document structure

text: Before each training run, our data-procurement process validates that all acquired datasets carry appropriate licences, that data subjects were informed of downstream ML use, and that no prohibited sensitive attributes are included without justification.
label: data_governance

text: The labelling workflow assigns every annotation to at least two independent reviewers; inter-annotator agreement below 0.80 Fleiss' kappa triggers a third review and adjudication by a senior subject-matter expert.
label: data_governance

text: Our bias audit computes disaggregated performance metrics across gender, age bracket, and postcode region before each production release; any metric gap exceeding five percentage points blocks promotion to production.
label: data_governance

text: The training, validation, and hold-out test splits are governed by our data-split policy, which prohibits any overlap, mandates stratification by class and demographic subgroup, and requires the test set to be locked before any model experiments begin.
label: data_governance

text: Personal data used to train the medical-risk predictor was pseudonymised and stored in a dedicated secure enclave; data minimisation principles required that only variables with documented clinical relevance be retained in feature engineering.
label: data_governance
note: HARD: near security (secure enclave) and data_governance (minimisation)

text: Data lineage is tracked from the raw source file through each transformation step using a metadata catalogue that records the hash, origin, processing date, and responsible data engineer for every intermediate dataset.
label: data_governance
note: HARD: near record_keeping — logging-like lineage tracking

text: Sensitive demographic attributes such as ethnicity and disability status are retained in a separate, access-controlled partition solely for bias validation purposes and are stripped from the production training feature set.
label: data_governance

text: We supplemented our scarce clinical training corpus with 40 000 synthetic records generated under a differential-privacy budget, with generation parameters documented and validated against the original distribution.
label: data_governance
note: synthetic data supplementation with privacy budget

text: Dataset versions are tagged with semantic version numbers, stored in immutable object storage, and accompanied by a data card that records sample size, collection period, inclusion criteria, and known limitations.
label: data_governance
note: HARD: near record_keeping — versioned, immutable storage

text: Third-party training datasets are reviewed against our data-ethics checklist before onboarding; if a dataset was originally collected without informed consent for ML use, it is excluded regardless of its technical quality.
label: data_governance

text: Die Qualitätssicherung der Trainingsdaten umfasst eine statistische Analyse auf Vollständigkeit, Ausreißer und Klassenungleichgewicht sowie eine manuelle Stichprobenkontrolle durch das Daten-Team.
label: data_governance

text: Unser Datengouvernanz-Rahmen legt fest, welche Teams Zugang zu den Rohdaten haben, wie Annotationen vergeben werden und wann veraltete Datensätze aus dem Trainingspool entfernt werden müssen.
label: data_governance

text: Statistical representativeness testing uses two-sample Kolmogorov–Smirnov tests and chi-squared tests to verify that the training distribution matches the expected deployment distribution across all critical input dimensions.
label: data_governance

text: Ground truth annotation protocol specifies exact labelling instructions, example edge cases with canonical answers, and a dispute-resolution escalation path to ensure consistency across a distributed annotation team.
label: data_governance

text: Data cleaning removes duplicate records, corrects systematic collection errors, and standardises date and currency formats; each cleaning operation is logged with the rule applied and the number of affected records.
label: data_governance
note: HARD: near record_keeping — cleaning operations logged

text: The AI system passport captures the intended use case, deployment boundary conditions, supported input modalities, and version history; it is the primary document reviewed by our regulatory affairs team before any market placement.
label: technical_documentation

text: Our design rationale records explain why we chose a gradient-boosted tree over a deep neural network for the credit-risk task: interpretability requirements, inference latency constraints, and available training data volume all favoured the ensemble approach.
label: technical_documentation

text: The technical dossier table of contents is structured to satisfy Annex IV of the EU AI Act, covering system description, development process, training methodology, validation results, and post-market surveillance arrangements.
label: technical_documentation

text: A model card is published for each production deployment, summarising the task definition, training data sources, known biases, accuracy benchmarks, out-of-scope uses, and the responsible team contact.
label: technical_documentation
note: model card as technical documentation artifact

text: Component interface specifications document every API contract between the inference engine, the feature store, and the serving layer, including input schema, output format, latency SLOs, and versioning strategy.
label: technical_documentation

text: The technical file records the intended purpose as defined at design time, distinguishing between primary clinical indications and explicitly out-of-scope patient populations that were excluded from validation.
label: technical_documentation
note: intended purpose scoping — medical device context

text: Known limitations of the recruitment-screening model are disclosed in the technical documentation, including degraded performance on candidates from countries underrepresented in the training corpus and for roles not covered by training.
label: technical_documentation
note: HARD: near transparency — limitation disclosure overlaps both articles

text: A capability versus limitation matrix in the technical file lists each documented system capability, the validation evidence supporting it, and the corresponding boundary condition where performance is not guaranteed.
label: technical_documentation
note: capability matrix as technical file element

text: Hyperparameter configuration is recorded in a dedicated section of the technical file, covering learning rate schedule, regularisation coefficients, batch size, and the grid search bounds used during optimisation.
label: technical_documentation

text: Validation methodology is documented in the technical dossier with a full description of the test protocol, dataset composition, evaluation metrics, confidence intervals, and comparison to the pre-specified minimum performance threshold.
label: technical_documentation

text: Die technische Dokumentation beschreibt die Systemarchitektur des Hochrisiko-KI-Systems und enthält Schnittstellen, Datenflüsse, Validierungsergebnisse und eine Beschreibung der Selbstlernmechanismen.
label: technical_documentation

text: In der technischen Akte sind alle wesentlichen Entwurfsentscheidungen mit Begründung, die verwendeten Algorithmen sowie die Ergebnisse der Konformitätsbewertung vollständig dokumentiert.
label: technical_documentation

text: The CE marking technical file for the clinical decision support system includes the notified body dossier, the risk management file, a list of applied harmonised standards, and the declaration of conformity.
label: technical_documentation

text: Our conformity assessment documentation demonstrates that the AI system meets all applicable requirements of Annex IV by mapping each requirement to the section of the technical dossier where evidence can be found.
label: technical_documentation

text: The submission package to the notified body comprises the technical file, a summary of safety and clinical performance, and a pre-determined change-management protocol for post-approval system updates.
label: technical_documentation

text: The inference logging module writes a structured JSON record to an append-only queue for every prediction, capturing the hashed input, predicted class, probability vector, model version, and wall-clock timestamp.
label: record_keeping

text: Our audit trail schema requires that each decision record include a unique trace ID, the user session token, all input features used by the model, the model's output with confidence, and a reference to the system version active at inference time.
label: record_keeping

text: The log retention policy mandates that AI decision records be held for five years for high-risk employment applications, after which they must be securely deleted using NIST SP 800-88 media sanitisation guidelines.
label: record_keeping
note: HARD: near data_governance — retention + deletion policy

text: Tamper-evident storage is achieved by forwarding inference logs in real time to an immutable object store with write-once locking enabled; any modification attempt generates an alert and is recorded in the security event log.
label: record_keeping

text: Decision record structure is defined in the data dictionary maintained by the compliance team; mandatory fields include decision outcome, confidence score, applicable article, intervention flag, and the reviewing operator's identifier.
label: record_keeping

text: Log access is restricted to authorised compliance officers and internal audit staff; all access events are themselves logged with the accessor's identity, access time, and stated purpose, forming a meta-audit trail.
label: record_keeping

text: Timestamp accuracy and log sequence integrity are verified daily by a reconciliation job that checks for gaps, duplicates, and clock-skew anomalies exceeding 500 milliseconds in the inference audit stream.
label: record_keeping

text: Event log archival procedures transfer logs older than 90 days from hot storage to a cold-tier archive, with cryptographic checksums verified on transfer to confirm no corruption occurred during migration.
label: record_keeping

text: Each inference record can be used to fully reproduce the decision made by the system, since the log captures not only the output but also the exact feature vector, the model artefact hash, and the serving environment configuration.
label: record_keeping
note: HARD: near technical_documentation — reproducibility from logs

text: Whenever a human reviewer overturns an AI recommendation, the system automatically writes an override event containing the original AI output, the reviewer's corrected decision, the stated reason code, and the reviewer's employee ID.
label: record_keeping
note: HARD: near human_oversight — override event logging

text: Das Protokollierungssystem zeichnet jede Modellentscheidung mit Eingabemerkmalen, Ausgabe, Konfidenz und Zeitstempel auf und leitet die Einträge unveränderlich in ein zentrales SIEM-System weiter.
label: record_keeping

text: Aufzeichnungen über KI-gestützte Kreditentscheidungen werden gemäß unserer Aufbewahrungsrichtlinie fünf Jahre lang in einem manipulationssicheren Archiv gespeichert und sind auf Anforderung der Aufsichtsbehörde zugänglich.
label: record_keeping

text: Post-incident log forensics for the fraud-detection system allowed our team to reconstruct the exact sequence of events leading to a disputed account freeze, identifying the causative input anomaly within two hours.
label: record_keeping

text: Chain of custody for audit logs requires that any export of records to an external party be co-signed by two authorised officers, documented in the custody register, and accompanied by a signed data-sharing agreement.
label: record_keeping

text: Automated log forwarding to a centralised SIEM ensures that inference records from all deployed AI instances are aggregated in real time, enabling cross-system anomaly detection and regulatory reporting from a single source of truth.
label: record_keeping

text: When the automated credit underwriting engine issues a decline, the affected customer receives a personalised letter within five working days that names the main factors driving the decision in plain language, without reference to algorithmic terminology.
label: transparency
note: customer decline letter — transparency to affected person

text: Section 4 of the operator handbook is dedicated to explaining how the AI scoring model produces its recommendations, including worked examples for common case types and a glossary of output fields.
label: transparency

text: Entries in the public AI register include the system name, its provider and deployer, the risk classification, the intended use population, the primary training data description, and the date of the last conformity assessment.
label: transparency

text: Individuals who receive an AI-influenced decision in our insurance-claims pipeline can request a written explanation that breaks down the three highest-weighted features and indicates how changing each factor would have altered the outcome.
label: transparency

text: Plain-language summaries accompany every automated hiring-screen result shared with candidates, stating that an AI system was used, identifying the provider, and explaining what the score represents and what it does not.
label: transparency

text: A persistent on-screen notification informs banking app users that the product-recommendation panel is powered by an AI model and provides a link to the full transparency notice in the privacy centre.
label: transparency

text: Instructions for use provided to the deployer describe the validated operating conditions, the intended user population, the confidence-interval performance data, and the specific circumstances under which the system should not be used.
label: transparency
note: HARD: near technical_documentation — IFU content vs. technical file

text: Our API consumer documentation discloses that the risk-scoring endpoint uses a machine learning model, describes the output field semantics, and warns integrators that the score must not be used as the sole basis for legally significant decisions.
label: transparency

text: The significant-decision letter sent to benefit claimants explains which automated assessment module evaluated their file, what information it used, what the outcome was, and how to request a human review of the decision.
label: transparency
note: benefit claimant notification with escalation path

text: In response to a right-to-explanation request, our data protection officer provided the applicant with a detailed account of the input variables, the model's prediction, and the reasoning chain that led from inputs to the hiring outcome.
label: transparency

text: Wir informieren alle Nutzerinnen und Nutzer des Kreditbewertungsportals darüber, dass ihre Bonität mithilfe eines KI-Systems bewertet wird, und geben an, welche Datenkategorien in die Bewertung einfließen.
label: transparency

text: Die Transparenzpflichten unseres Unternehmens verlangen, dass jeder Bescheid über eine KI-gestützte Ablehnung eine verständliche Erläuterung der ausschlaggebenden Kriterien enthält.
label: transparency

text: Model limitations disclosed in the product notice include the geographic regions in which the system has been validated, the languages supported, and the demographic groups for which performance data is available.
label: transparency

text: Automated decision disclosure embedded in the terms of service informs users that account risk categorisation is performed by an algorithmic system and that they can request human intervention at any time.
label: transparency
note: HARD: near human_oversight — disclosure of right to human review

text: A dedicated AI transparency icon in the product interface, visible on every AI-influenced recommendation card, links to a layered notice explaining the system's purpose, the data used, and users' rights to contest the outcome.
label: transparency

text: Our analyst review workflow requires that every loan application flagged as marginal by the AI credit engine be examined by a qualified underwriter, who must record their assessment and either confirm or overrule the recommendation before a decision is issued.
label: human_oversight
note: human review workflow for marginal cases

text: Confidence threshold escalation is configured at 0.70: any prediction below this probability score is automatically placed in the human-review queue and cannot be released as a final decision without a reviewer's signature.
label: human_oversight

text: Each instance of a human reviewer overturning an AI recommendation is logged with the reviewer's identity, the original AI output, the new decision, the reason code selected from a controlled vocabulary, and elapsed time from assignment to override.
label: human_oversight

text: The duty supervisor protocol grants the on-call supervisor the authority to suspend all AI-assisted triage decisions and revert the ward to manual clinical assessment within 60 seconds, without requiring IT involvement.
label: human_oversight

text: Human-in-the-loop operational design means that the AI module in our benefits-assessment system produces a recommended outcome but can never finalise a denial; all denials require a case officer's confirmed sign-off.
label: human_oversight

text: Stop-the-line authority is delegated to any member of the audit team who observes a pattern of suspect AI outputs; they can flag the model for immediate withdrawal from production pending investigation by the model risk committee.
label: human_oversight

text: Competency requirements for staff authorised to review AI-generated medical imaging reports include specialist radiologist qualifications and completion of a two-hour module on interpreting AI confidence scores and known failure modes.
label: human_oversight

text: Alert routing is configured so that high-severity flags from the automated fraud-detection model are immediately assigned to a senior analyst, while lower-severity flags enter a batched queue reviewed within four business hours.
label: human_oversight

text: Intervention frequency is reported monthly: if the override rate drops below three percent, a case review is triggered to determine whether reviewers are rubber-stamping AI outputs rather than exercising independent judgement.
label: human_oversight
note: HARD: near security/record_keeping — override rate monitoring

text: Manual review workload capacity is maintained at no more than 80% utilisation so that human reviewers are never pressured by queue depth to skip the required deliberation before confirming or overturning an AI output.
label: human_oversight
note: workload capacity management for oversight quality

text: Menschliche Prüfer müssen jede KI-Empfehlung in Hochrisikosituationen aktiv bestätigen, bevor eine rechtlich bindende Entscheidung getroffen wird, und ihre Überprüfungsentscheidung im System dokumentieren.
label: human_oversight

text: Die Abbruchfunktion erlaubt es dem Schichtleiter, den KI-Betrieb sofort zu stoppen und zur vollständig manuellen Bearbeitung zurückzukehren, ohne dass eine Systemadministratorgenehmigung erforderlich ist.
label: human_oversight

text: The four-eyes principle for high-stakes credit decisions requires that AI recommendations above a defined exposure threshold be reviewed independently by two qualified credit officers before the bank commits to the lending decision.
label: human_oversight

text: Override rates are reported quarterly to the AI governance committee, which scrutinises any significant change in the proportion of AI recommendations accepted versus rejected by human reviewers as a leading indicator of model drift.
label: human_oversight
note: HARD: near record_keeping — rate reporting as oversight metric

text: The fallback manual process is documented, trained to relevant staff, and tested quarterly to confirm that the team can operate the credit-assessment workflow entirely without the AI system in the event of an unplanned outage.
label: human_oversight
note: fallback manual process — business continuity for oversight

text: Our red-team exercise, conducted by an independent security team with no prior knowledge of the model internals, spent two weeks attempting to craft inputs that would cause the loan-approval system to produce systematically biased or manipulated outputs.
label: security

text: Accuracy monitoring is implemented as a live dashboard that computes rolling 7-day precision and recall for each output class; automatic alerts fire when any metric deviates more than three percentage points from the 30-day baseline.
label: security

text: Our cybersecurity threat model for the inference API covers input validation attacks, model inversion, membership inference, and prompt injection; mitigations for each threat vector are documented and verified annually.
label: security

text: Annual penetration testing of the model-serving infrastructure is conducted by an accredited third-party assessor following OWASP guidelines for ML systems; critical and high findings must be remediated before the next model release.
label: security

text: Model poisoning countermeasures include hash verification of all training datasets before each run, canary samples inserted into the pipeline whose expected labels detect label-flipping attacks, and provenance attestation for all data sources.
label: security
note: HARD: near risk_management — poisoning as risk; near data_governance — dataset integrity

text: Adversarial robustness benchmarking applies the AutoAttack suite to the production model checkpoint monthly; any degradation in certified accuracy below the specified floor triggers a model risk escalation.
label: security

text: Concept drift detection runs hourly, comparing the input feature distribution of live traffic against the reference training distribution using the Population Stability Index; a PSI above 0.20 triggers investigation and potential retraining.
label: security
note: HARD: near data_governance — distribution shift detection

text: Access to production model artefacts is restricted through a secrets manager with role-based access control; all access events are audited, and model weights are encrypted at rest using AES-256 with customer-managed keys.
label: security
note: model artefact access control and encryption

text: The inference API is protected by a web application firewall configured to detect anomalous query patterns, rate-limit burst traffic, and block IP ranges associated with known model-scraping or model-inversion attacks.
label: security

text: Performance SLA monitoring requires that the model maintain 99.5% uptime and a median response latency below 120 milliseconds; degradation beyond these bounds triggers automatic failover to a cached rule-based fallback.
label: security

text: IT-Sicherheitsmaßnahmen für das KI-System umfassen Ende-zu-Ende-Verschlüsselung aller Inferenzanfragen, Zugriffskontrolle nach dem Prinzip der minimalen Rechtevergabe und regelmäßige Penetrationstests.
label: security

text: Robustheitstests prüfen das Modell auf Empfindlichkeit gegenüber gezielt verfälschten Eingaben und Verteilungsverschiebungen, um sicherzustellen, dass die Systemleistung im Einsatz stabil bleibt.
label: security

text: Supply chain integrity for model weights is ensured by cryptographic signing of every artefact published by the training pipeline; the deployment pipeline verifies the signature before loading the model into the serving container.
label: security
note: supply chain integrity for ML artefacts

text: Our vulnerability disclosure policy encourages responsible reporting of model-level vulnerabilities by external researchers, with a defined triage timeline of 48 hours and a patching commitment of 30 days for critical issues.
label: security
note: responsible disclosure policy for ML systems

text: Model parameters are encrypted in transit between the training cluster and the model registry using mutual TLS, and the deployment automation verifies the digest of the loaded model against the registry record before serving begins.
label: security
note: in-transit encryption and integrity verification for model weights

text: In accordance with Article 30 of the GDPR, we maintain a record of processing activities covering all data categories processed, the legal basis for each, the data retention periods, and third-country transfers, updated annually by the Data Protection Officer.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: GDPR Art. 30 RoPA looks like record_keeping

text: The Data Protection Impact Assessment for the HR analytics tool identified three significant privacy risks; mitigating controls were documented, and residual risks were formally accepted by the DPO and Head of Legal before processing commenced.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: DPIA looks like risk_management; no EU AI Act obligation

text: Our ISO 27001 certification scope covers the information security management system for all cloud-hosted data processing, including the access management framework, incident response procedures, and business continuity plans.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: ISO 27001 cert scope looks like security

text: Data subject access requests received under GDPR Article 15 are processed within 30 days; the DSAR workflow routes requests to the relevant data steward, who compiles the response from the authorised data inventory.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: DSAR process looks like transparency/record_keeping but is pure GDPR

text: The business continuity plan is tested annually with a tabletop exercise that simulates a 72-hour loss of the primary data centre; recovery time objectives and recovery point objectives are verified against the agreed service-level agreements.
label: unrelated
note: BCP testing — infrastructure, not EU AI Act

text: Third-party supplier due diligence requires all vendors with access to personal data to complete a security questionnaire, provide evidence of ISO 27001 or SOC 2 certification, and sign a data processing agreement before onboarding.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: vendor due diligence looks like data_governance but is procurement/GDPR compliance

text: Das Verzeichnis der Verarbeitungstätigkeiten gemäß Art. 30 DSGVO wird vierteljährlich aktualisiert und dokumentiert alle Verarbeitungsvorgänge mit Zweck, Rechtsgrundlage und Speicherdauer.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: German GDPR RoPA looks like record_keeping

text: Für das HR-Analyse-Tool wurde eine Datenschutz-Folgenabschätzung nach Art. 35 DSGVO durchgeführt; identifizierte Risiken wurden mit dem Datenschutzbeauftragten abgestimmt und durch technische Maßnahmen gemindert.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: German DPIA looks like risk_management in German

text: The research ethics committee reviewed the proposed study design, evaluated potential participant harms, assessed data anonymisation adequacy, and issued conditional approval subject to annual re-review by the institutional review board.
label: unrelated
note: ethics committee review — board governance, not EU AI Act

text: The patent application for the novel gradient-descent optimisation technique was filed with the European Patent Office; pending grant, the invention is protected by the filing's priority date and may not be disclosed in technical documentation without legal clearance.
label: unrelated
note: patent filing — IP process, not compliance obligation

text: The SOC 2 Type II audit report covers the trust service categories of security, availability, and confidentiality for the cloud data processing platform; the auditor found no exceptions to the described controls over the 12-month review period.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: SOC 2 audit looks like security but is a different framework

text: Our consent management platform records the specific consent choice made by each user, the version of the privacy notice shown at consent time, and the timestamp; consents are version-controlled and can be replayed during regulatory inspection.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: consent management looks like record_keeping but is GDPR, not EU AI Act

text: The NIST Cybersecurity Framework maturity assessment rated our identify and protect functions at tier 3, with detect and respond functions at tier 2; a roadmap to close the gap was presented to the board in Q1.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: NIST CSF maturity assessment looks like security

text: Scope 2 carbon emissions from data-centre electricity consumption are measured quarterly using location-based and market-based methods; results are disclosed in the annual sustainability report aligned with GRI standard 302.
label: unrelated

text: The employee data processing register captures all instances where staff personal data is used for payroll, performance management, and access control; it is reviewed by HR and Legal annually and updated following any new processing activity.
label: unrelated
note: HARD: employee data register looks like record_keeping but is GDPR-internal HR
